title: SENSORY SQUISH MAT
features: Keeps young ones engaged and occupied
description: Product Description This mat is designed to provide a sensory experience that helps reduce stress and anxiety, while also promoting focus and concentration. It's particularly helpful for individuals with conditions such as ADD/ADHD, OCD, autism, and high anxiety levels. Additionally, the sensory bean bags toy is perfect for toddlers during playtime, allowing them to develop their motor skills and burn off energy. It's not just great for family games, but keeps young ones engaged and occupied for extended periods of time.
